citations.narrative:
There were designated areas of full-contact animal interactions in which inspectors observed members of the public
directly contacting animals during the inspection. There was not a readily-identifiable attendant present at all times during
the animal contact experiences with the kittens, the baby bunnies, baby chicks, adult chickens, and goats. Not having a
responsible, knowledgeable, readily-identifiable employee or attendant during times of public contact does not help
prevent improper handling or feeding of animals and increases the risk to the public and the animals. Correct by ensuring
that a responsible, knowledgeable, and readily identifiable employee or attendant is present at all times during animal
interactions with the public to protect both the public and the animals.
***Correct from 8/1/2025 going forward.
This inspection was conducted with the facility representatives and the exit interview was conducted with the facility
representatives and the attending veterinarian.
Additional Inspectors:
LYNNE WHITE-SHIM, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER
Lemnique Wafer, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n

narrative:
2.131(d)(2) 
   
Handling of animals. 
There were designated areas of full-contact animal interactions in which inspectors observed members of the public 
directly contacting animals during the inspection. There was not a readily-identifiable attendant present at all times during 
the animal contact experiences with the kittens, the baby bunnies, baby chicks, adult chickens, and goats. Not having a 
responsible, knowledgeable, readily-identifiable employee or attendant during times of public contact does not help 
prevent improper handling or feeding of animals and increases the risk to the public and the animals. Correct by ensuring 
that a responsible, knowledgeable, and readily identifiable employee or attendant is present at all times during animal 
interactions with the public to protect both the public and the animals.  
 
***Correct from 8/1/2025 going forward. 
 
This inspection was conducted with the facility representatives and the exit interview was conducted with the facility 
representatives and the attending veterinarian. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
LYNNE WHITE-SHIM, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER 
Lemnique Wafer, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
